task_snapshot.title: Database backup file backup rollback tag and Docker cleanup evidence closure
acceptance: Creates evidence requirements for PostgreSQL backup, file storage backup, previous API/Web image tags, release image tags, rollback owner, observation window, rollback triggers, and Docker cleanup result.
Defines what evidence proves backup readability and rollback readiness without storing secrets or production paths that expose credentials.
Records Docker cleanup as a post-health-check gate and requires explicit skip/failure reasons if cleanup cannot run.
Marks missing backup, rollback tag, rollback owner, or Docker cleanup evidence as No-Go.
Does not run backup, restore, rollback, Docker cleanup, deploy, migration, seed, or production data operations.
task_snapshot.blocked_reason: deferred while AGENT_PLATFORM_V2 P0 work is in progress
task_snapshot.resume_condition: Unblock only after AGENT-PLATFORM-V2-A5-EVENT-SOURCING-ARCH is completed/audited or the user explicitly resumes PROD-EVIDENCE-20260621-002.
